violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

The door to the outside, located at the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
Low boy freezer door handle was not in good repair, observed being held together with tape. PIC ordered part prior to inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the soda area shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The floors behind soda area have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
